output_preview: {"answer":"src/auth/queue.ts deduplicates refresh work per tenant so duplicate refreshes for the same tenant share one in-flight refresh while unrelated tenants can refresh concurrently.","evidence":{"session_id":"ses_1e52da8baffesb1MVFye5KPZ5Q","blob_id":"auth_queue","message_id":"msg_e1ad257560013lVRxyTebU59WS"},"why_not_global_mutex":"A global mutex would unnecessarily serialize refreshes across different tenants, blocking unrelated tenants and violating the different-tenants-parallel behavior.","irrelevant_context_ignored":["billing retry queue rationale","markdown parser onboarding cleanup"]}
